hero.title: Find the right vehicle in Madagascar
hero.subtitle: Madagascar's #1 auto marketplace

home.thematic4x4Subtitle: Off-road capability, durability, and mixed road/trail use.
home.thematicCitySubtitle: Daily mobility, urban comfort, and versatility.
home.thematicUtilitySubtitle: Business transport, logistics, and passenger activity.
home.thematicElectricSubtitle: More efficient powertrains for your trips.

listing.notFoundDesc: This listing does not exist or has been removed.
listing.contactNameOrEmail: Please provide at least your name or email
listing.whatsappUnavailable: WhatsApp number unavailable for this listing.
listing.contactTooFast: Please wait a few seconds before trying again.
listing.trustStatus: Listing is active in the public catalog
listing.ownerPendingReview: Your listing is under review. It will be publicly visible after validation.
listing.ownerPendingPayment: Payment or proof is pending verification. The listing stays offline until confirmed.
listing.ownerPendingPaymentVerification: Your payment is under verification. Credits will be assigned after proof validation.
listing.ownerRejected: This listing has been rejected. Contact support for more information.
listing.ownerDraft: Draft — complete publishing from your dashboard.
listing.ownerPaused: Listing paused — it does not appear in search.
listing.ownerNonActive: This listing is not currently published.
listing.contactSendError: Unable to send your message at the moment.
listing.stateLoadingDesc: We are preparing vehicle information and contact options.
listing.runtimeUnavailable: This listing is temporarily unavailable. Please come back in a few moments or return to search.
listing.trustLayerSubtitle: Useful indicators to decide more confidently before contacting.
listing.locationApproxDesc: Approximate area on the map (exact address is not publicly shown).
listing.locationNoCoords: No map position has been saved for this vehicle.
listing.mapFallback: Map is unavailable for this vehicle. The text address above remains your main reference.

search.title: Search results
search.recentSortHint: Listings with visibility options (top, featured, refresh) are shown first, then newest listings.
search.tryDifferent: Try changing or resetting your filters
search.tryDifferentWiden: Expand the city, budget, or vehicle type, or reset filters.
search.noExactMatchTitle: No vehicles match your search exactly.
search.similarIntro: Here are similar vehicles you may like (same city, relaxed criteria).
search.alsoLikeHint: Other listings close to your search, in addition to the results above.
search.quartiersGroupedHint: Select one or more neighborhoods — all are kept.
search.terrainNotForRent: Some categories are not available for this listing type.
search.surfaceHint: Drag the right handle to widen max mileage.
search.heroLead: Explore verified listings with advanced filters to find the right vehicle faster.
search.runtimeDataUnavailable: The catalog is temporarily unavailable. Please retry in a few moments.
search.runtimeGenericError: Listings cannot be loaded right now. Check your connection and retry.

publish.title: Publish a listing
publish.titleMin: Title must be at least 5 characters
publish.titlePlaceholder: Ex: Toyota Hilux 2021 in excellent condition
publish.activationNote: Your listing will be activated after payment confirmation.
publish.successPaid: Listing created! It will be activated after payment confirmation.
publish.photoUploadPartial: Some photos could not be uploaded
publish.mapNoCoordsForCity: Unable to place the map for this city. Check the city name or contact support.
publish.photoPartialFail: {{n}} photo(s) could not be saved. Check your connection and complete later from your dashboard if needed.
publish.stepMainSubtitle: Set the essentials of your listing clearly.
publish.stepMainHelper: Define transaction, vehicle type, and location for immediate clarity.
publish.stepDetailsHelper: Precise title, coherent price, and full vehicle identity build trust.
publish.stepMediaHelper: Prefer sharp photos and a strong cover to improve contact intent.
publish.stepVisibilityHelper: Review summary, adjust options, then send your listing for moderation.
publish.transactionHint: Define how your listing is offered (sale, rental, or short-term rental).
publish.prePublishModerationHint: We review every listing to protect catalog quality.
publish.guidedFlowHint: Complete each step to move forward smoothly.
publish.listingLocationHint: City and map point are required to publish.
publish.mainPhotoFirst: Upload your best photos first. The first image becomes the cover by default.
publish.advancedMediaHint: Add a video or virtual tour link if available.
publish.finalizeStepHint: Review cost, choose visibility options, then submit your listing for moderation.
publish.editCreditsHint: Edit mode: no extra credits are charged. Paid visibility options cannot be modified here.
publish.editCostFree: Saving your changes is free. If listing was online, it will go back to review when content changed.
publish.needMoreCredits: Insufficient balance to submit this listing with selected options.
publish.draftKept: Your draft remains saved: you can publish after obtaining credits.
publish.boostHonest: Selected boosts will be applied when listing goes live, subject to availability.
publish.boostPragmaticHint: Select only options you need now: you can publish without boost.
publish.agencySpotlightDesc: Strengthen your brand presence on the portal (after approval). Dealer accounts only.
publish.buyCreditsAccordionHint: Open this section only if your balance is insufficient.
publish.buyCreditsHint: Manual payment: send amount then attach proof. No credit is added before validation.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noListings: No listings yet. Publish your first listing!
dashboard.deleteDesc: This action is irreversible. The listing and all photos will be permanently deleted.

auth.name: Full name
auth.signupSuccess: Sign up successful! Check your email to confirm your account.
auth.resetExpired: If this page does not change, your link may have expired.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.resetEmailSent: A reset email was sent to
auth.contactConsent: I agree that my contact details can be used for exchanges related to my AutoNex listings.
auth.contactConsentRequired: Please accept use of your contact details to continue.
auth.fieldsRequired: Please provide first name, last name, and phone.
auth.agencyFieldsRequired: For an agency account, provide business name, address, contact name, phone, NIF, STAT, and RC.
auth.contactNameNotPhone: The business contact name must not be the same as the phone number. Check the "Business contact" and "Phone" fields.
auth.contactNameNotNumeric: Enter a person's name for business contact (not only digits).
auth.googleLoginParticulierOnly: Available for individual accounts only. Agencies must use email and password.
auth.googleSignupParticulierOnly: Individual account only — no agency sign-up with Google.
auth.agencyLoginEmailOnly: Agency login: use the email and password for your professional account.
auth.loginRequiredForListingContact: Log in to contact the seller.

agencies.title: Car dealers
agencies.noAgencies: No partner dealers at the moment.
agencies.notFoundDesc: This dealer does not exist or has been removed.
agencies.noListings: No active listings at the moment.

estimation.title: Valuation
estimation.landingLead: In a few steps, get a clear and credible valuation you can use before publishing.
estimation.marketRangeDesc: A reliable base to decide your price positioning.
estimation.confidenceLevelDesc: An immediate read of estimate strength.
estimation.recommendedPriceDesc: Ready to use to publish quickly on AutoNex.
estimation.readyNextDesc: After valuation, publish your vehicle with a recommended price.
estimation.howItWorksDesc: Describe your vehicle, specify condition, then receive a structured valuation report in seconds.
estimation.reliableTransparentDesc: The tool combines reference profiles and market signals. Each estimate includes range and confidence.
estimation.convertReadyDesc: Once value is generated, publish immediately with a recommended price.
estimation.vehicleIdentityLead: Provide key vehicle information to build a reliable and actionable estimate base.
estimation.catalogLoadingDesc: We are preparing makes and models for reliable input.
estimation.catalogUnavailableDesc: Catalog is temporarily unavailable. Retry valuation in a few moments.
estimation.referenceReadyUi: Valuation reference is ready (UI curated source).
estimation.noModelFound: No model found for this make
estimation.errorYearRange: Year must be between 1950 and current year.
estimation.errorMileageRange: Mileage must be between 0 and 1,500,000 km.
